title: Get PRICE-for-car-model-variant Relationship
description:
* The ›for-car-model-variant‹ relationship for the selected PRICE is returned when one exists. -> Status Code \`200\`
* The response contains the relationship ID, the relationship name and the relationship partner.
* An empty response is returned when the selected PRICE has no ›for-car-model-variant‹ relationship. -> Status Code \`200\`
* Requests with invalid ID are rejected. This can happen when there exists no node with the given ID or it is not a PRICE. -> Status Code \`404\`
